'''âp-sh-z''' ('''kapashaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mogul|mogul]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mogul|mogul]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-sh-z
|-
! Lemma
| kapashaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipashaz|thipashaz]] || [[word:jipashaz|jipashaz]] || [[word:shipashaz|shipashaz]] || [[word:kipashaz|kipashaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupashaz|thuthupashaz]] || [[word:jujupashaz|jujupashaz]] || [[word:shushupashaz|shushupashaz]] || [[word:kukupashaz|kukupashaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupashaz|thupashaz]] || [[word:jupashaz|jupashaz]] || [[word:shupashaz|shupashaz]] || [[word:kupashaz|kupashaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupashaz|thupashaz]] || [[word:jupashaz|jupashaz]] || [[word:shupashaz|shupashaz]] || [[word:kupashaz|kupashaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepashaz|thepashaz]] || [[word:jepashaz|jepashaz]] || [[word:shepashaz|shepashaz]] || [[word:kepashaz|kepashaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopashaz|thothopashaz]] || [[word:jojopashaz|jojopashaz]] || [[word:shoshopashaz|shoshopashaz]] || [[word:kokopashaz|kokopashaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopashaz|thopashaz]] || [[word:jopashaz|jopashaz]] || [[word:shopashaz|shopashaz]] || [[word:kopashaz|kopashaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopashaz|thopashaz]] || [[word:jopashaz|jopashaz]] || [[word:shopashaz|shopashaz]] || [[word:kopashaz|kopashaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpashaz|thĂŠpashaz]] || [[word:jĂŠpashaz|jĂŠpashaz]] || [[word:shĂŠpashaz|shĂŠpashaz]] || [[word:kĂŠpashaz|kĂŠpashaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapashaz|thathapashaz]] || [[word:jajapashaz|jajapashaz]] || [[word:shashapashaz|shashapashaz]] || [[word:kakapashaz|kakapashaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapashaz|thapashaz]] || [[word:japashaz|japashaz]] || [[word:shapashaz|shapashaz]] || [[word:kapashaz|kapashaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapashaz|thapashaz]] || [[word:japashaz|japashaz]] || [[word:shapashaz|shapashaz]] || [[word:kapashaz|kapashaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapashaz|shapashaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapashaz|goshapashaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapashaz|gokishapashaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapashaznĂŒ|shapashaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapashaznknĂŒ|goshapashaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapashaznĂŒ|gokishapashaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapashazshĂ«|shapashazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapashaznkshĂ«|goshapashaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapashazshĂ«|gokishapashazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapashazro|shapashazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapashaznkro|goshapashaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapashazro|gokishapashazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapashazmu|shapashazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapashaznkmu|goshapashaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapashazmu|gokishapashazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapashazsher|shapashazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapashaznksher|goshapashaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapashazsher|gokishapashazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapashazng|shapashazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapashaznkng|goshapashaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapashazng|gokishapashazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapashazya|shapashazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapashaznkya|goshapashaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapashazya|gokishapashazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapashazyam|shapashazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapashaznkyam|goshapashaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapashazyam|gokishapashazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapashaznĂŒshĂ«|shapashaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapashaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshapashaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapashaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishapashaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapashaznĂŒro|shapashaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapashaznknĂŒro|goshapashaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapashaznĂŒro|gokishapashaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapashaznĂŒmu|shapashaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapashaznknĂŒmu|goshapashaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapashaznĂŒmu|gokishapashaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapashazshĂ«nĂŒ|shapashazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapashaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapashaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapashazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapashazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapashazshĂ«ro|shapashazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapashaznkshĂ«ro|goshapashaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapashazshĂ«ro|gokishapashazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapashazshĂ«mu|shapashazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapashaznkshĂ«mu|goshapashaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapashazshĂ«mu|gokishapashazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapashazronĂŒ|shapashazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapashaznkronĂŒ|goshapashaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapashazronĂŒ|gokishapashazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapashazroshĂ«|shapashazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapashaznkroshĂ«|goshapashaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapashazroshĂ«|gokishapashazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapashazromu|shapashazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapashaznkromu|goshapashaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapashazromu|gokishapashazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapashazmunĂŒ|shapashazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapashaznkmunĂŒ|goshapashaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapashazmunĂŒ|gokishapashazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapashazmushĂ«|shapashazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapashaznkmushĂ«|goshapashaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapashazmushĂ«|gokishapashazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapashazmuro|shapashazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapashaznkmuro|goshapashaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapashazmuro|gokishapashazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
